title: MakerEnvelope
description: Structured maker output. Routing/health signal ONLY — never gate evidence (REQ-C1, ADR-0002). The harness re-derives all gate facts from the written files.

status.description: self-reported; corroborated by evaluator score, never trusted alone (REQ-OBS3)

exported_signatures.description: self-reported signatures — IGNORED for conformance; harness AST-extracts the truth (ADR-0012)
